title: Reconnection Logic — Backoff, Sequence, State Sync
summary: Connections drop on network interruptions, server restarts, and idle timeouts. Missed connections mean missed signals and missed trades. This feature makes container-to-brain connections resilient: exponential backoff, sequence number gap detection, and a signal snapshot on reconnect.
approach: Container side: implement exponential backoff reconnect (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, cap at 60s). On reconnect, send last_seen_sequence to brain. Brain side: on container reconnect with last_seen_sequence, replay any signals since that sequence number (keep a rolling 5-minute signal buffer). Containers detect gaps by checking if received sequence != last + 1 and request replay. Add a 30-second ping/pong heartbeat between brain and each container. Write tests: simulate disconnect mid-sequence, verify container catches up on reconnect.
